desc.zh: 黄石现代有轨电车（Huangshi Rail Transit），是服务于中国湖北省黄石市境内的现代有轨电车系统，其第一条线路于2022年12月28日开通运营一期工程（黄石大道站-市民之家站）。
desc.en: Huangshi Modern Tram  is a modern tram system serving Huangshi City in Hubei Province, China. Its first line opened for trial operation on December 28, 2022, covering the first phase from Huangshi Avenue Station to Citizen's Home Station.
